name: Dhamma Dhara Vipassana Meditation Center
description: Dhamma Dhara is a Vipassana meditation center in Shelburne Falls, Massachusetts, offering 10-day silent meditation courses in the tradition of S.N. Goenka. It is one of the oldest and largest Goenka centers in North America. Courses are offered entirely on a donation basis. The center sits on 108 acres in the hills of western Massachusetts and operates year-round.
